---
title: "Tutoriales"
---

```{=html}
<style>
  :root {
    --fc-bg: #f8faf7; --fc-surface: #f0f4ef; --fc-elevated: #e6ede4;
    --fc-primary: #10b981; --fc-deep: #059669; --fc-sky: #0ea5e9;
    --fc-text: #1a2e1a; --fc-muted: #4a6741;
    --fc-border: rgba(16,185,129,0.18); --fc-radius: 14px;
    --fc-transition: 0.28s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
  }
  .tut-hero { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#1a2e1a 0%,#10b981 60%,#0ea5e9 100%); border-radius: var(--fc-radius); padding: 2.4rem 2rem 2rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; color:#fff; }
  .tut-hero-eyebrow { font-size:.72rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); margin-bottom:.5rem; }
  .tut-hero h1 { font-size:clamp(1.5rem,4vw,2.2rem); font-weight:700; margin:0 0 .7rem; }
  .tut-hero p { font-size:1rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85); margin:0; max-width:560px; line-height:1.6; }
  .tut-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,1fr)); gap:1.4rem; margin-bottom:2.4rem; }
  .tut-card { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.82); backdrop-filter:blur(10px); border:1px solid var(--fc-border); border-radius:var(--fc-radius); overflow:hidden; text-decoration:none !important; color:inherit !important; display:flex; flex-direction:column; transition:transform var(--fc-transition),box-shadow var(--fc-transition); }
  .tut-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 10px 32px rgba(16,185,129,0.18); }
  .tut-card-img { width:100%; height:180px; object-fit:cover; background:var(--fc-elevated); display:block; }
  .tut-card-img-placeholder { width:100%; height:180px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e8f5e9,#d1fae5); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:3rem; }
  .tut-card-badge { position:absolute; top:.8rem; right:.8rem; background:rgba(16,185,129,0.9); color:#fff; border-radius:100px; padding:.2rem .7rem; font-size:.72rem; font-weight:600; }
  .tut-card-body { padding:1.3rem 1.4rem 1.5rem; flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; position:relative; }
  .tut-card-icon { width:40px; height:40px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e8f5e9,#d1fae5); border-radius:10px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:1.2rem; margin-bottom:.8rem; }
  .tut-card-title { font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--fc-text); margin:0 0 .4rem; }
  .tut-card-desc { font-size:.88rem; color:var(--fc-muted); line-height:1.55; flex:1; margin:0 0 1rem; }
  .tut-card-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.4rem; background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--fc-primary),var(--fc-deep)); color:#fff !important; text-decoration:none !important; padding:.5rem 1.1rem; border-radius:100px; font-size:.82rem; font-weight:600; align-self:flex-start; transition:filter var(--fc-transition); }
  .tut-card-btn:hover { filter:brightness(1.08); }
  .github-feedback-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.5rem; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a2e1a,#10b981); color:#fff !important; text-decoration:none !important; padding:.7rem 1.5rem; border-radius:100px; font-size:.88rem; font-weight:600; box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(26,46,26,0.25); transition:filter var(--fc-transition),transform var(--fc-transition); margin-top:.5rem; }
  .github-feedback-btn:hover { filter:brightness(1.1); transform:translateY(-2px); }
  @media(max-width:640px){.tut-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.tut-hero{padding:1.6rem 1.2rem;}}
  @media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.tut-card,.tut-card-btn,.github-feedback-btn{transition:none;}}
</style>

<div class="tut-hero">
  <div class="tut-hero-eyebrow">LCZ4r · Tutoriales</div>
  <h1>Tutoriales LCZ4r</h1>
  <p>Aprenda a usar LCZ4r paso a paso — desde la instalación hasta análisis avanzados de Islas de Calor Urbanas y Zonas Climáticas Locales.</p>
</div>

<div class="tut-grid">

  <a href="https://bymaxanjos.github.io/LCZ4r/es/articles/about.html" class="tut-card" style="position:relative;">
    <span class="tut-card-badge">Esencial</span>
    <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ByMaxAnjos/LCZ4r/main/vignettes/fig_general_1_1.png" alt="LCZ Map" class="tut-card-img" onerror="this.style.display='none'">
    <div class="tut-card-body">
      <div class="tut-card-icon">🗺️</div>
      <div class="tut-card-title">Tutorial Introductorio</div>
      <p class="tut-card-desc">Aprenda el flujo completo: desde la instalación del paquete hasta la creación de mapas ZCL y series temporales. Ideal para principiantes.</p>
      <span class="tut-card-btn">Empezar Ahora →</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="https://bymaxanjos.github.io/LCZ4r/es/reference/index.html" class="tut-card" style="position:relative;">
    <span class="tut-card-badge">Avanzado</span>
    <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ByMaxAnjos/LCZ4r/main/vignettes/fig_local_uhi_2.png" alt="UHI Analysis" class="tut-card-img" onerror="this.style.display='none'">
    <div class="tut-card-body">
      <div class="tut-card-icon">🌡️</div>
      <div class="tut-card-title">Análisis de Isla de Calor Urbana</div>
      <p class="tut-card-desc">Explore flujos de trabajo avanzados para el cálculo de intensidad ICU, detección de anomalías térmicas e interpolación de temperatura del aire.</p>
      <span class="tut-card-btn">Ver Funciones →</span>
    </div>
  </a>

</div>
```

---

## ¿Tiene comentarios o sugerencias?

¿Tiene ideas para mejorar o encontró algún error? ¡Nos encantaría escucharle!

```{=html}
<a href='https://github.com/ByMaxAnjos/LCZ4r/issues/new' class="github-feedback-btn">
  <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 0C5.37 0 0 5.37 0 12c0 5.31 3.435 9.795 8.205 11.385.6.105.825-.255.825-.57 0-.285-.015-1.23-.015-2.235-3.015.555-3.795-.735-4.035-1.41-.135-.345-.72-1.41-1.23-1.695-.42-.225-1.02-.78-.015-.795.945-.015 1.62.87 1.845 1.23 1.08 1.815 2.805 1.305 3.495.99.105-.78.42-1.305.765-1.605-2.67-.3-5.46-1.335-5.46-5.925 0-1.305.465-2.385 1.23-3.225-.12-.3-.54-1.53.12-3.18 0 0 1.005-.315 3.3 1.23.96-.27 1.98-.405 3-.405s2.04.135 3 .405c2.295-1.56 3.3-1.23 3.3-1.23.66 1.65.24 2.88.12 3.18.765.84 1.23 1.905 1.23 3.225 0 4.605-2.805 5.625-5.475 5.925.435.375.81 1.095.81 2.22 0 1.605-.015 2.895-.015 3.3 0 .315.225.69.825.57A12.02 12.02 0 0 0 24 12c0-6.63-5.37-12-12-12z"/></svg>
  Abrir un issue en GitHub
</a>
```
